title: G-Craft +
description:
OUTDATED, please use the G-Craft modpack. 

modrinth.com/modpack/g-craft
body:
# **Discontinuated, plaese use [G-Craft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/g-craft)**

Sorry to bother you but,if you are a current user of G-Craft + we recommend you to switch to the G-Craft modpack.

If you want to keep your world you will need to copy them manually.

How to :

📁Open modpack folder (G-Craft + )

Find the "save" folder

Copy all your world to your clipboard (Ctrl + c) (CMD + c)

Open the G-Craft folder (after installing it)

Paste your world onto the "save" folder

Done !
